title: Production Operations Hardening Pack
decision_rationale: GL-216 consolidates production operations posture, adds a structured artifact, and adds a safe local-only gate without claiming Production SaaS readiness or changing production systems. Remaining operations blockers stay open for GL-217.

current_operations_state_summary.developer_preview_controlled_preview: GrantLayer remains Developer Preview / Controlled Preview with strict boundaries and synthetic/demo data only.
baselines: operator token hashing and tenant binding
safe synthetic backup/restore and audit export checks
ephemeral live PostgreSQL validation passed in GL-206B

production_operations_gap_assessment.production_postgres: No production DB topology, pooling, permissions, capacity, maintenance, failover, or managed-service validation.
production_operations_gap_assessment.migrations: No production rollback playbooks, expand/contract policy, restore-before-migrate gate, or data migration rehearsal.
production_operations_gap_assessment.backup_restore_dr: No automated PostgreSQL backup scheduling, encrypted/offsite retention, restore RTO/RPO, or failover exercise.
production_operations_gap_assessment.audit_export: No production export approvals, tenant-scoped real-data export workflow, encryption, retention, or legal review.
production_operations_gap_assessment.observability: No external metrics, tracing, log retention, SIEM, dashboards, SLOs, or alert routing.
production_operations_gap_assessment.alerting: No monitored signals, thresholds, escalation schedules, pager routing, or alert tests.
production_operations_gap_assessment.incident_response: No staffed production incident rota, exercise cadence, evidence preservation process, or customer notification process.
production_operations_gap_assessment.abuse_rate_limit: No edge/WAF controls, distributed limiter, abuse dashboards, blocklist workflow, or operational tuning process.
production_operations_gap_assessment.secret_key_rotation: No KMS/HSM, rotation schedule, dual-key rollover, break-glass vaulting, or automated deprovisioning.
production_operations_gap_assessment.admin_operator_emergency: No dual-control break-glass, emergency access review, tenant emergency freeze, or production approval workflow.
production_operations_gap_assessment.tenant_workspace: Workspace enforcement, provisioning, RLS, tenant lifecycle, and adversarial multi-tenant operations remain blockers.
production_operations_gap_assessment.retention_deletion_redaction: No production retention schedules, legal holds, deletion workflows, redaction approvals, or destruction evidence.
production_operations_gap_assessment.release_rollback: No production release train, rollback authority, artifact signing, change freeze, or customer-impact procedure.
production_operations_gap_assessment.runbook_ownership: No named production owners, approvals, on-call, runbook drills, or go/no-go evidence package.

implemented_hardening_summary: Added scripts/ops/gl216_production_operations_gate.py as a dry-run/plan-only local checklist and environment safety helper.
No backend source, migration, schema, dependency, workflow, publish, snapshot, website, deployment, cloud, SDK package, or production credential changes were made.

production_postgres_operations_posture.summary: GL-206B passed ephemeral PostgreSQL validation using synthetic/demo data, but production PostgreSQL readiness remains no-go.

migration_forward_rollback_strategy.current: Migration dry-run/idempotency checks exist and were exercised against ephemeral PostgreSQL.

backup_restore_dr_posture.current: Synthetic SQLite drill, PostgreSQL ephemeral-only manual checklist, and safe plan modes exist.

observability_logging_correlation_postur.current: Structured logging, correlation IDs, redaction helpers, and security-event categories exist as a controlled-preview baseline.

alerting_monitoring_posture.current: Documented posture only; no pager, SIEM, cloud monitor, or third-party alert integration added.

incident_response_posture.current: Baseline categories and GitHub Security Advisory route exist.

secret_key_rotation_lifecycle_posture.current: Fail-closed secret config and operator token hashing baselines exist.
secret_key_rotation_lifecycle_posture.gl216_addition: Dry-run environment detection for production-like DSN/credential signals.

retention_deletion_redaction_operations_.current: Source audit history remains immutable; redaction applies to derived outputs.

tenant_workspace_operational_posture.current: Application-layer tenant baseline improved by GL-215.

admin_operator_emergency_posture.current: Admin/operator tenant control-plane baseline exists and was improved by GL-214.

release_versioning_rollback_posture.current: Internal issue gates and regression suites exist.

production_runbook_gate_checklist: production PostgreSQL topology, permissions, maintenance, pooling, and failover plan approved
backup scheduling, encryption, offsite retention, restore RTO/RPO, and DR rehearsal passed
migration expand/contract, forward-fix, rollback, and restore checkpoint process rehearsed
external logging, metrics, tracing, dashboards, SLOs, and alert routing tested
incident response ownership, escalation, evidence preservation, and post-incident review process established
secret/key storage, rotation, revocation, and break-glass lifecycle tested
tenant/workspace production blockers resolved or explicitly accepted by a later gate
admin/operator emergency controls, dual-control, and audit review tested
retention, deletion, redaction, audit export, and legal hold processes approved for any future real-data posture
release/versioning/rollback ownership and customer-impact process approved
production_readiness_impact: GL-216 improves operations documentation and adds a safe local gate check. It does not make GrantLayer production-ready. Production SaaS, real data, production PostgreSQL readiness, and compliance certification remain no-go.
controlled_preview_impact: Controlled Preview remains limited to synthetic/demo data with strict boundaries. GL-216 improves operator visibility into remaining operations gaps and does not authorize broader preview expansion.
remaining_operations_blockers: production PostgreSQL operating model, failover, permissions, pooling, capacity, and monitoring
automated PostgreSQL backup scheduling, restore verification, encrypted offsite retention, RTO/RPO, and DR failover
production migration rollback/forward strategy and rehearsal
external observability, alerting, paging, dashboards, SLOs, and log retention
staffed incident response program and exercises
distributed abuse/rate-limit controls and operational tuning workflow
secret/key rotation automation, KMS/HSM lifecycle, and break-glass controls
workspace enforcement and full tenant lifecycle operations
retention, deletion, redaction, legal hold, and audit export approval workflows

risk_register.risk: Production PostgreSQL posture overclaimed from ephemeral validation
risk_register.mitigation: Explicit no-go wording and GL-217 blocker

risk_register.risk: Backup/restore/DR assumptions not rehearsed against PostgreSQL
risk_register.mitigation: Keep real-data no-go and require future ephemeral and managed-service drills
Require external stack and alert tests before any go/no-go change
Require KMS/HSM or equivalent rotation design

risk_register.risk: Tenant/workspace baseline mistaken for production-complete isolation
risk_register.mitigation: Preserve GL-215 caveats and require future workspace/tenant operations gate

findings: GL-216 is production operations hardening, not a production SaaS readiness declaration.
Ephemeral live PostgreSQL validation passed but production PostgreSQL readiness remains no-go.
Backup/restore/DR posture is improved only to the documented/tested dry-run and synthetic baseline.
Observability/incident posture is improved only to the documented/tested baseline.
Remaining operations blockers must be resolved or explicitly handled by a later go/no-go gate.
